name: Sales vs Purchase
query:
SELECT
    Tab.Warehouse AS "Warehouse:Link/Warehouse:200",
    IFNULL(Tab.SalesInvoiceAmount, 0) AS "SalesInvoiceAmount:Float:200",
    IFNULL(Tab.PurchaseInvoiceAmount, 0) AS "PurchaseInvoiceAmount:Float:200",
    IFNULL(Tab.EndDayStockValue, 0) AS "EndDayStockValue:Float:200",
    IFNULL(Tab.DCValue, 0) AS "DCValue:Float:200"
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            W.name AS "Warehouse",
            (
                SELECT SUM(SI.total)
                FROM `tabSales Invoice` SI
                WHERE SI.set_warehouse = W.name
                AND SI.docstatus = 1
                AND (DATE(SI.posting_date) BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s)
                AND SI.company = %(company)s
            ) AS "SalesInvoiceAmount",
            (
                SELECT 
                     SUM(PI.base_total)
                
                FROM `tabPurchase Invoice` PI
                WHERE PI.set_warehouse = W.name
                    AND PI.docstatus = 1
                    AND (DATE(PI.posting_date) BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s)
                    AND PI.company = %(company)s
            ) AS "PurchaseInvoiceAmount",
            (
               SELECT
           
              sum(sle.stock_value_difference)
          FROM
           `tabStock Ledger Entry` AS sle
         where sle.company =  %(company)s and sle.is_cancelled = 0 and sle.docstatus < 2 and sle.warehouse = W.name  
               and sle.posting_date <= %(to_date)s
        Order by 
        sle.posting_date DESC 
               
            ) AS "EndDayStockValue",
                
                
               COALESCE((
        SELECT SUM(DCI.qty * I.last_purchase_rate)
        FROM `tabDelivery Note` DC
        INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Note Item` DCI ON DC.name = DCI.parent
        LEFT OUTER JOIN `tabItem` I ON I.name = CASE 
            WHEN DCI.item_code LIKE '%%-F' THEN REPLACE(DCI.item_code, '-F', '-S')
            ELSE DCI.item_code 
        END
        WHERE DC.set_warehouse = W.name
        AND DC.docstatus = 1
        AND(DATE(DC.posting_date) BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s)
        AND DC.company = %(company)s
    ), 0) AS "DCValue"
            



        FROM
            `tabWarehouse` AS W 
            
             
        WHERE
            W.company = %(company)s  
            AND W.name not like '%%Expenses%%'
           
        GROUP BY W.name
    ) AS Tab
WHERE
    Tab.SalesInvoiceAmount > 0 OR Tab.PurchaseInvoiceAmount > 0 OR Tab.EndDayStockValue > 0 OR Tab.DCValue > 0;
